task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Impress application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The specific presentation file is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The window title bar or application tab shows 'flowchart_test.odp'.

task_completion.description: At least 4 shapes are present on the slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main slide canvas contains 4 or more distinct shapes (e.g., rectangles, diamonds, ovals, parallelograms).

task_completion.description: At least 2 connectors are present between the shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are 2 or more connector lines linking the shapes together. In Impress, connectors typically snap to the connection points on the edges of the shapes.

task_completion.description: The diagram visually represents a process flowchart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The shapes and connectors are arranged in a logical sequence or structure typical of a flowchart, and may contain text indicating steps or decisions in a process.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to create the flowchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Impress interface, drawing toolbars being used, and shapes being drawn on the canvas, rather than a terminal window running a script to modify the ODP file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual LibreOffice Impress application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches LibreOffice Impress, not a web-based drawing tool, image editor, or a different presentation software.

integrity.description: The flowchart was created progressively during the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the flowchart being built step-by-step (e.g., adding one shape, then another, then connectors) rather than a fully completed flowchart appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a flowchart in LibreOffice Impress using the file /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/flowchart_test.odp. To pass the verification criteria, the first slide (index 0) must contain at least 4 shapes and at least 2 connectors between the shapes. Connectors are specific line types in Impress that link shapes.
